module.name: ast/types
module.description: Higher-level AST helpers for TypeScript type and wrapper-node evaluation.

scenarios.name: should return the simple identifier name for an unqualified type reference
scenarios.given: a TSTypeReference whose typeName is an Identifier

scenarios.name: should return null for a qualified type reference name
scenarios.given: a TSTypeReference whose typeName is a TSQualifiedName

scenarios.name: should report whether a type reference has type arguments
scenarios.given: a TSTypeReference with or without type arguments
scenarios.then: returns true only when at least one type argument exists

scenarios.name: should match a type reference by its simple identifier name
scenarios.given: a TSTypeReference and an expected simple type name
scenarios.then: returns true only when the type reference name matches

scenarios.name: should return true when every type-literal member is a readonly property signature
scenarios.given: a TSTypeLiteral whose members are all readonly TSPropertySignature nodes

scenarios.name: should return false when any type-literal member is mutable or non-property
scenarios.given: a TSTypeLiteral containing a mutable property or a non-property member

scenarios.name: should recursively unwrap TypeScript wrapper expressions
scenarios.given: an expression wrapped in nested as, satisfies, or non-null TypeScript wrapper nodes

scenarios.name: should return the original expression when no wrapper is present
scenarios.given: an expression that is not wrapped by TypeScript wrapper nodes
